title: triticum dicoccum var. straussiana
intro: Triticum dicoccum var. straussiana is an ancient, hulled emmer wheat, a type of wild wheat that belongs to the Triticeae tribe of grasses. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of Triticum dicoccum var. straussiana include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve insulin sensitivity, and provide antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of Triticum dicoccum var. straussiana can be made into teas, infusions, and supplements, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
